<a id="class-visualshadernodeswitch"></a>

# VisualShaderNodeSwitch

**Inherits:** [VisualShaderNode](class_visualshadernode.md#class-visualshadernode) **<** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

A selector function for use within the visual shader graph.

## Description

Returns an associated value of the [op_type](#class-visualshadernodeswitch-property-op-type) type if the provided boolean value is `true` or `false`.

## Properties

| [OpType](#enum-visualshadernodeswitch-optype)   | [op_type](#class-visualshadernodeswitch-property-op-type)   | `0`   |
|-------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|-------|
